compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for v2 removal from skills and prompts
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Write behavioral tests verifying .tickets/ and bare tk references are absent from skill files and prompts.

## Files to create
- tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh (new)

## Tests to write
1. test_sprint_skill_no_dot_tickets_find — verify sprint/SKILL.md has no 'find .tickets/' pattern
2. test_sprint_skill_no_dot_tickets_edit — verify sprint/SKILL.md has no 'edit .tickets/<id>.md' instruction
3. test_end_session_dot_tickets_updated — verify end-session/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/ in guards
4. test_resolve_conflicts_dot_tickets_updated — verify resolve-conflicts/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/
5. test_impl_plan_no_dot_tickets — verify implementation-plan/SKILL.md has no .tickets/<id>.md references
6. test_preplanning_no_dot_tickets — verify preplanning/SKILL.md has no .tickets/<id>.md references
7. test_brainstorm_no_dot_tickets — verify brainstorm/SKILL.md has no .tickets/*.md grep patterns
8. test_oscillation_no_dot_tickets — verify oscillation-check/SKILL.md references .tickets-tracker/ not .tickets/
9. test_sprint_prompts_no_dot_tickets — verify sprint prompts have no .tickets/ references

## TDD Requirement
All tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 4 implementation. Negative constraint assertions (acceptable structural test category).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and all FAIL (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED'
- [ ] At least 9 test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ - brainstorm SKILL.md has .tickets/*.md (line 51), oscillation-check SKILL.md has bare .tickets/ (line 90), sprint prompts/epic-validation-review.md has .tickets/ (line 58). Sprint/end-session/resolve-conflicts/impl-plan/preplanning are already clean.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ - created tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh with 9 test functions checking for absence of v2 .tickets/ patterns across sprint, end-session, resolve-conflicts, implementation-plan, preplanning, brainstorm, oscillation-check, and sprint prompts
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ - test file written (this is a RED test-writing task; no implementation changes needed)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ - tests run with exit 1 (RED state confirmed): 6 PASSED, 3 FAILED. Failures: test_brainstorm_no_dot_tickets, test_oscillation_no_dot_tickets, test_sprint_prompts_no_dot_tickets. Output contains 'FAILED' string.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ - AC1: bash test output contains FAILED (verified). AC2: grep -c test_ returns 27 >= 9 (verified). RED state confirmed for brainstorm, oscillation-check, and sprint prompts tests.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/skills/test-v2-skills-cleanup.sh created. Tests: 6 pass, 3 fail (RED state confirmed).
